facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 339 reviews. At a vegetarian bistro in Phu Quoc.

Bếp Chay Nhà An on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is quietly pulling numbers that most meat restaurants here can't touch. Plant-based done right, no compromise on flavor. Locals know. The review count proves it.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 339 people rated this vegetarian spot in Phu Quoc 4.9 stars. Watch what comes out of that kitchen. Bếp Chay Nhà An is not what you expect, and that's exactly the point.

instagram.caption:

Bếp Chay Nhà An is the plant-based spot nobody warns you about. Tag your travel buddy.
